---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working correctly
labels: bug
---

## Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include any error messages shown in the UI.

## Environment
- OS: (e.g. macOS 14.4 arm64, Ubuntu 22.04)
- App version: (e.g. v0.1.1 — visible in Settings or the release page)
- ngrok version: (run `ngrok version`)
- Install method: (DMG / AppImage / built locally)

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or logs that might help.
